# KillSignal enumeration

The two OS-appropriate termination escalation levels (spec §8.6.3; R-8.6.3-a).

```csharp
public enum KillSignal
```

## Values

| name | value | description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Terminate | `0` | A graceful terminate request — POSIX `SIGTERM`; the process may clean up and exit. |
| Force | `1` | A forced, immediate kill — POSIX `SIGKILL`; the process cannot intercept it. |
